commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Bdellium. Bdellium, according to Pliny, ( lib. xii. 9,) between white and yellow. It might resemble a tarnished pearl or ivory in colour, and coriander-seed in shape.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Bdellium: Bdellium, according to Pliny, 1. 21, c. 9. was of the colour of a man's nail, white and bright.
